indications.text:
Benicar is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering
blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily
strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled trials of
antihypertensive drugs from a wid...

antihypertensive drugs from a wid...

Benicar is indicated for the treatment of hypertension in adults and children six years of
age and older, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of
fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions.
These benefits have been seen in cont...

Benicar is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in
combination with other antihypertensive agents.
